title: 30 minutes before the dump, my system saw it coming.
author: Next-Syrup6935
selftext:
I’ve lost count of how many times I’ve been blindsided by sudden dumps.

https://preview.redd.it/8hqt3hdqrmwf1.png?width=604&format=png&auto=webp&s=de9e31755763f5b0165dbc23f0efc5aba12e88e8

  
Last week it happened again… or almost did.  
But this time I got a heads up from a system I’ve been building for months.  
It scans charts, reads headlines, backtests structure, finds potential trade, tracks sentiment shifts, all automatically.

The analyze I got: “High-risk collapse forming. Hedge or stay out.”  
3 days later, the market nuked.

  
Typically i'm not a great trader, but i'd like to call myself a decent one being in profit since 2019, this recent crash is typically where i'd lose, but this time I was already out. Journaling have helped me a lot throughout my career and now AI is having the same if not larger impact on my trading style. Mostly use it as a confirmation indicator still but it's been showing strong results.
